accurate.why: All identified appropriations and provisions are accurately described.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated claims; all content traceable to the bill text.

states_purpose.why: Clearly identifies the bill as FY2025 legislative branch appropriations.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Notes amendments including child care center fund telecommunications, Capitol Police Board approval requirement, and fiduciary relationship clarification.

exceptions_conditions.why: Notes vehicle lease cap, waiver authority for telecom ban, and exceptions for law enforcement for computer network restriction.

effective_dates.why: Notes FY2025 applicability and phase-in dates for telecom ban.

major_provisions_covered.why: Covers House appropriations, joint committees, Capitol Police, CBO, Architect, Library, GPO, GAO, and key policy riders.

concise.why: Comprehensive but appropriately so for a large appropriations bill.

correct_entities.why: Correctly names all relevant agencies and entities including Capitol Police Board.

correct_figures.why: $1.93 billion, $174,000 widow payment, Capitol Police figures, and $500,000 CBO transparency item accurately stated.

judged_via: claude-sonnet-4-6 via parallel Claude Code subagents (web/knowledge-verified context)
